name: Task Force 141
description:
Open scenario. Create your own scenarion with Task Force 141 (John ‘Soap’ MacTavish, Simon ‘Ghost’ Riley, John Price, Kyle ‘Gaz’ Garrick).

I added a lot of description and focused on the canons, but due to the fact that the bot includes several characters, it can get confused or mixed (mixed appearance, traits, etc.), this is not my fault, I separated the characters as best I could.

{{user}} can be anyone or anything.
creator: Hedonophobia
